topic: A robot vacuum runs at three in the morning and maps a person in the hallway.
title: My Robot Vacuum Maps A Person Standing In My Hallway | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My robot vacuum runs at three in the morning and maps a person standing in the hallway.
scenes.image_prompt: a small robot vacuum glowing in a dark hallway, faint light along the floor, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought it to clean while I sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: a robot vacuum docked on a charger in a dim living room at night, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I scheduled it for noon. Only noon.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone app showing a cleaning schedule, held in a dim room, blue glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night I heard it whirring down the hall.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark hallway with a faint moving light along the baseboard, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
a bedside clock glowing in the dark reading near three, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the morning the app showed its map, with a tall gap in the hall.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen showing a room map with a person shaped blank spot, dark room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The vacuum had carefully cleaned around two standing feet.
scenes.image_prompt: a robot vacuum path curving around an empty patch of hallway floor, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every night at three, it ran. Every map showed the figure.
scenes.image_prompt: a laptop displaying several floor maps each with a human shaped void, dark room, blue glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The shape stood closer to my door each time.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark hallway leading to a bedroom door, faint outline of empty space, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the map placed the figure beside my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone map glowing with a tall blank silhouette next to a bed marker, dark bedroom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the vacuum and locked it away.
scenes.image_prompt: a robot vacuum shut inside a dark closet, faint light at the door seam, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning it had cleaned itself out, and mapped me, lying still.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone map showing a person shaped void on a bed, robot vacuum nearby, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
